subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards God, the Mighty, the All-Wise, that he may rejoice in Our remembrance of him and be drawn unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله العزیز الحکیم لیفرح بذکری ایاه و یجذبه الی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
